# Thumb First Design

The design-judgment layer of the thumb-first mobile suite — decides WHAT the right mobile pattern is and WHY, platform-agnostic across web and native.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add thumb-first-design --to ./skills
```
